name: Zoho CRM
description: Manage Zoho CRM (leads, contacts, accounts, deals, tasks, notes, custom modules) from any AI agent. 10 tools, OAuth refresh-token auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Zoho CRM API v8 (www.zohoapis.com/crm/v8).

**Setup — OAuth client + refresh token**:
1. Go to https://api-console.zoho.com → **Add Client → Self Client**. Generate a 'grant token' with scope `ZohoCRM.modules.ALL,ZohoCRM.settings.READ,ZohoCRM.users.READ` and copy it.
2. Exchange it for a refresh token via:
   `curl -X POST 'https://accounts.zoho.com/oauth/v2/token?grant_type=authorization_code&client_id=CLIENT_ID&client_secret=CLIENT_SECRET&code=GRANT_TOKEN'`
3. Save the `refresh_token` from the response. Set `ZOHO_CLIENT_ID`, `ZOHO_CLIENT_SECRET`, `ZOHO_REFRESH_TOKEN`.
4. **Data centre matters**: Zoho hosts data in regional clusters: `.com` (US, default), `.eu` (EU), `.in` (India), `.com.au` (AU), `.jp` (Japan). If your org is on a non-US DC change baseUrl + token URL accordingly — wrong DC returns `INVALID_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: the engine handles the OAuth2 refresh flow — every call exchanges the refresh token for a short-lived (1h) access token and sends it as `Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken ACCESS_TOKEN`. Zoho uses `Zoho-oauthtoken` instead of `Bearer` — non-standard but documented.

**Module API**: every record type (Leads/Contacts/Accounts/Deals/Tasks/...) lives at `/crm/v8/{module}`. Custom modules use their API name (`Cf__Custom_Module1`). List of module API names is exposed via the modules metadata endpoint.

**Bulk writes**: insert/update endpoints expect `{data: [{...}, {...}], trigger: ['approval','workflow','blueprint']}` shape — wrap a single record in an array.

**Pagination**: `page` + `per_page` (max 200). Response has `info: {more_records: bool, page: N, per_page: N}`.

**Rate limits**: 50 req/min per OAuth client + daily credits (5k on free, 25k on Standard, 250k on Enterprise). 429 → exponential backoff.

**Out of scope here**: bulk import (CSV upload + polling), territory rules CRUD, workflow execution, Sandbox switching.

tools.name: zoho_crm_list_records
tools.description: List records of any module (Leads, Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Tasks, custom). Pass module API name. Use `fields` to project specific fields and limit payload size.

module.description: Module API name: Leads, Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Tasks, Calls, Notes, ...

fields.description: Comma-separated field API names to return (highly recommended for performance).

sort_by.description: Field API name to sort by.

tools.name: zoho_crm_get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by ID from any module.

tools.name: zoho_crm_search_records
tools.description: Search records using one of three modes: `criteria` (Zoho's COQL-like criteria syntax), `email`, `phone`, or `word` (text search). Returns matching records with all fields.

tools.name: zoho_crm_create_records
tools.description: Create one or more records in a module. Pass `data` as an array even for one record. Returns per-record success/failure with the new record IDs.

data.description: Array of record objects with field-API-name → value pairs.

trigger.description: Array of triggers to fire: 'approval', 'workflow', 'blueprint'. Empty to skip all.

tools.name: zoho_crm_update_records
tools.description: Update one or more records. Each item in `data` must include `id` of the record to update.

data.description: Array of record objects, each must include `id` + the fields to change.

tools.name: zoho_crm_upsert_records
tools.description: Insert OR update by duplicate-check fields. Useful when sync'ing from external systems. Pass `duplicate_check_fields` (comma-separated field API names) to define how matches are detected.

duplicate_check_fields.description: Field API names used to detect duplicates.

tools.name: zoho_crm_delete_record
tools.description: Delete a single record by ID. Optionally trigger workflows.

tools.name: zoho_crm_list_notes
tools.description: List notes attached to a record (works on any module).

tools.name: zoho_crm_create_note
tools.description: Add a note to a record.

tools.name: zoho_crm_list_modules
tools.description: List all modules in the org (standard + custom) with their API names, display names, and whether they're CRM-modifiable. Use this to discover which `module` strings you can pass to the other tools.
